zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Engaine於1279年出生在英國英格蘭戴文考金頓時，她的父親John Engaine50歲，母親Joan Greinville43歲。她於大約1296年與Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年6月1日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年36歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Engaine于1279年出生在英国英格兰戴文考金頓时，她的父亲John Engaine50岁，母亲Joan Greinville43岁。她于大约1296年与Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年6月1日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年36岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Engaine was born in 1279, in Cockington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Engaine, was 50 and her mother, Joan Greinville, was 43. She married Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles about 1296, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 June 1315, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Engaine est née en 1279, à Cockington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Engaine, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Joan Greinville, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles environ 1296, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1315, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Engaine 1279 in Cockington, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Engaine 50 und ihre Mutter Joan Greinville 43. Sie hat um 1296 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1315 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Engaine è nata il nel 1279 nel Cockington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Engaine, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Joan Greinville, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles circa 1296, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1315, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Engaineが1279年にイギリスイギリスデボンコクイントンで生まれた時，父John Engaineは50歳，母Joan Greinvilleは43歳であった。約1296年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでSir Adam de Welles Lord Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1315年6月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで36歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Engaine(이)가 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 콕잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Greinville(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Engaine nasceu em 1279, em Cockington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Engaine, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Joan Greinville, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles aproximadamente 1296, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1315, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ro.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Engaine родилась в 1279 г. в местности коккингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Engaine было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Greinville, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles около 1296 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1315 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Engaine nació en 1279, en Cockington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Engaine, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Joan Greinville, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles aproximadamente 1296, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1315, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
